problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: If Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
